requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62368-1 / GSO Standards, 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G Plug
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全 — IEC 62368-1 / GSO标准，230 V / 50 Hz / G型插头
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全 — IEC 62368-1 / GSO標準，230 V / 50 Hz / G型插頭

summary.en: Bahrain operates at 230 V AC / 50 Hz mains supply. The standard plug type is Type G (BS 1363, three-pin rectangular) — the same as the United Kingdom and the UAE, reflecting Bahrain's British administrative legacy. Electrical safety compliance for information and communications technology equipment and audio/video equipment is required to IEC 62368-1 (or its predecessor IEC 60950-1 for legacy products in transitional scope) as adopted under relevant GCC/GSO equivalent standards. The GSO has adopted IEC 62368-1 within its technical regulation framework. Mains-powered wireless devices must demonstrate electrical safety conformance; this may be assessed as part of the GSO conformity process or required as a standalone technical standard by TRA Bahrain for in-scope product categories. Products must be physically compatible with Bahrain mains supply (230 V / 50 Hz) and Type G outlet; Chinese Type I (two or three flat pins) or Type A plugs are not compatible without adaptation.
summary.zh: 巴林市电为230 V交流/50 Hz。标准插头类型为G型（BS 1363，三矩形扁销）——与英国及阿联酋相同，反映了巴林的英国行政遗留。信息和通信技术设备及音视频设备的电气安全合规须依据IEC 62368-1（或对于处于过渡范围内传统产品的前身IEC 60950-1），按相关GCC/GSO等效标准执行。GSO已在其技术法规框架内采纳IEC 62368-1。市电供电的无线设备须证明电气安全合规性；这可能作为GSO合规流程的一部分进行评估，或由巴林TRA对列入范围的产品类别作为独立技术标准要求。产品须与巴林市电供应（230 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理兼容；中国I型（两或三扁销）或A型插头在不经改造的情况下不兼容。
summary.zht: 巴林市電為230 V交流/50 Hz。標準插頭類型為G型（BS 1363，三矩形扁插）——與英國及阿聯酋相同，反映了巴林的英國行政遺留。資訊和通訊技術設備及音視頻設備的電氣安全合規須依據IEC 62368-1（或對於處於過渡範圍內傳統產品的前身IEC 60950-1），按相關GCC/GSO等效標準執行。GSO已在其技術法規框架內採納IEC 62368-1。市電供電的無線設備須證明電氣安全合規性；這可能作為GSO合規流程的一部分進行評估，或由巴林TRA對列入範圍的產品類別作為獨立技術標準要求。產品須與巴林市電供應（230 V / 50 Hz）及G型插座物理相容；中國I型（兩或三扁插）或A型插頭在不經改造的情況下不相容。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62368-1:2018 (Audio/video, IT and communication technology equipment safety — 3rd edition)
GSO IEC 62368-1 (GCC adoption of IEC 62368-1 for electrical safety)
GSO Technical Regulation for Consumer Electronics Safety (GCC member states)

summary.en: China uses 220 V AC / 50 Hz with Type I (two or three flat-pin) and Type A plug sockets. Electrical safety for IT and AV equipment is governed by GB 4943.1 (equivalent to IEC 60950-1) and progressively GB 4943.23 (equivalent to IEC 62368-1). CCC certification covers electrical safety for products listed in the CCC catalogue. Chinese products tested to GB 4943.1 hold CCC marks but are not rated for 230 V Type G plug configuration.
summary.zh: 中国使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（两或三扁销）及A型插座。IT及音视频设备的电气安全依据GB 4943.1（相当于IEC 60950-1）及逐步推进的GB 4943.23（相当于IEC 62368-1）执行。CCC认证涵盖CCC目录内产品的电气安全。依GB 4943.1测试并持有CCC标志的中国产品不适用于230 V G型插头配置。
summary.zht: 中國使用220 V交流/50 Hz，I型（兩或三扁插）及A型插座。IT及音視頻設備的電氣安全依據GB 4943.1（相當於IEC 60950-1）及逐步推進的GB 4943.23（相當於IEC 62368-1）執行。CCC認證涵蓋CCC目錄內產品的電氣安全。依GB 4943.1測試並持有CCC標誌的中國產品不適用於230 V G型插頭配置。

standards_or_laws: GB 4943.1-2011 (IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 60950-1)
GB 4943.23-2023 (audio/video/IT equipment safety — equivalent to IEC 62368-1)
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — electrical safety scope
GB 1002 / GB 2099 (Chinese plug and socket standards)

gap.en: Bahrain uses 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs, while China uses 220 V / 50 Hz with Type I or A plugs. Wireless devices with mains power supplies must be rated for 230 V and fitted with or supplied with a Type G plug for Bahrain. CCC electrical safety certification to GB 4943.1 is not recognised in Bahrain; IEC 62368-1 test evidence under GSO standards is required for mains-powered wireless devices, whether assessed through the GSO conformity scheme or as a TRA Bahrain type approval technical requirement. Power supply unit redesign or dual-voltage specification may be needed.
gap.zh: 巴林使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头，而中国使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插头。带市电电源的无线设备须额定230 V并为巴林配备或提供G型插头。GB 4943.1下的CCC电气安全认证不被巴林承认；市电供电的无线设备须提供GSO标准下的IEC 62368-1测试证据，可通过GSO合规方案或作为巴林TRA型号认证技术要求进行评估。可能需要重新设计电源模块或采用双电压规格。
gap.zht: 巴林使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭，而中國使用220 V / 50 Hz的I型或A型插頭。帶市電電源的無線設備須額定230 V並為巴林配備或提供G型插頭。GB 4943.1下的CCC電氣安全認證不被巴林承認；市電供電的無線設備須提供GSO標準下的IEC 62368-1測試證據，可通過GSO合規方案或作為巴林TRA型號認證技術要求進行評估。可能需要重新設計電源模組或採用雙電壓規格。

source.publisher: GSO — Gulf Standardization Organization (GCC Standardization Organization)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Electrical safety compliance to IEC 62368-1 under GSO standards is required for mains-powered wireless devices sold in Bahrain. Bahrain uses 230 V / 50 Hz / Type G (BS 1363) plugs; Chinese power accessories rated for 220 V with Type I or A plugs must be adapted. CCC certification to GB 4943.1 is not accepted as a substitute.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 在巴林销售的市电供电无线设备须符合GSO标准下的IEC 62368-1电气安全要求。巴林使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插头；额定220 V的I型或A型中国电源配件须进行适配。GB 4943.1下的CCC认证不可作为替代。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 在巴林銷售的市電供電無線設備須符合GSO標準下的IEC 62368-1電氣安全要求。巴林使用230 V / 50 Hz / G型（BS 1363）插頭；額定220 V的I型或A型中國電源配件須進行適配。GB 4943.1下的CCC認證不可作為替代。
